Summary

Full-stack software engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable web applications and data-driven dashboards. Proficient in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Experienced with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and AWS deployments. Track record of shipping robust product features in fast-moving startup and scale-up environments.

Experience

Junior Full-Stack Developer
Loopline Technologies
Jun 2019 – May 2021
  • Built React dashboard components and REST API endpoints in Node.js/Express for a B2B project management SaaS product serving 50+ business clients.
  • Designed PostgreSQL schemas and wrote Knex.js migrations for core product entities (users, projects, tasks, comments), supporting data integrity across the platform.
  • Integrated AWS S3 for file storage, enabling profile image uploads and project attachment management for end users.
  • Contributed to reporting features by building Chart.js dashboards that displayed project completion rates and team velocity using aggregated PostgreSQL query results.
  • Configured GitHub Actions CI pipeline for automated linting and unit tests on every pull request, reducing broken builds reaching staging.
Mid-Level Full-Stack Developer
Meridian SaaS
Jun 2021 – May 2024
  • Developed TypeScript React dashboards for a client-facing analytics platform serving 200+ e-commerce businesses, collaborating with product and design teams.
  • Built Node.js/TypeScript REST APIs for data querying, aggregation, and report export (CSV, Excel), reducing average report generation time by 35% through query optimization.
  • Optimized PostgreSQL query performance on tables with 100M+ rows, improving dashboard load times through strategic indexing and query restructuring.
  • Extended GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline to include automated integration tests, EC2 staging deployments, and Slack notifications, decreasing deployment errors by 50%.
  • Containerized the Node.js API with Docker and used Docker Compose for local multi-service development, standardizing the development environment across a team of 6 engineers.
  • Built ETL scripts in Node.js/TypeScript to ingest client data from CSV uploads and webhook events into PostgreSQL, processing up to 500,000 records per batch.

B.Sc. Computer Science
